r4.req_text: PhD students must bring their own resources to their PhD program.

influential_utterances.turn_text: I am not a successful one but I have studied the placement and trajectory of many PhD students before I start. My major takeaway is that: you should never expect enough resource from the department. You should bring your resource to your PhD, not work under the assumption of limited resource, like the hunter of the tribe
influential_utterances.explanation: The advice to bring one's own resources is framed as a necessity due to limited departmental support.
